---
title: "The Rev. Richard St. John Tyrwhitt"
---

## The Rev. Richard St. John Tyrwhitt

**Dates:** (1827-1895)

### Description

art critic, contributor to <i>MP</i> (1877-81)

### Letters

- [To Sir Walter Besant, Febry 7th [1899?][[footnote:1]]](../letters/3394_To_Sir_Walter_Besant.html)
- Letter from February 27 [1886]] 
- Letter from March 4th 1885
- Letter from May 4th [1881?]
- Letter from Oct 1st 1877 

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
